mapper.select: select op.pollutant_code as pollutantCode, pc.pollutant_name_cn as pollutantNameCn, pc.pollutant_unit_cn as pollutantUnitCn, pc.pollutant_name_en as pollutantNameEn, pc.pollutant_unit_en as pollutantUnitEn from t_ent_output_pollutant op left join t_bas_pollutant_code pc on pc.pollutant_code = op.pollutant_code where op.out_put_id = #{outPutId} order by op.pollutant_sort desc

select i.ent_code as entCode, e.ent_name as entName, p.out_put_id as outPutId, i.out_put_code as outPutCode, i.out_put_name as outPutName, i.mn_num as mnNum, i.out_put_type as outPutType, p.pollutant_code as pollutantCode, p.monthly_limit_value as monthlyLimitValue, pc.pollutant_name_cn as pollutantNameCn, pc.pollutant_name_en as pollutantNameEn, pc.pollutant_unit_cn as pollutantUnitCn, pc.pollutant_unit_en as pollutantUnitEn , p.mon_factor as monFactor, p.is_continuity_alarm as isContinuityAlarm, p.is_negative_alarm as isNegativeAlarm, p.is_zero_alarm as isZeroAlarm, p.over_maxValue as overMaxValue , p.over_minValue as overMinValue from t_ent_output_pollutant p left join t_ent_out_put_info i on i.out_put_id = p.out_put_id left join t_bas_enterprise e on e.ent_code = i.ent_code left join t_bas_pollutant_code pc on pc.pollutant_code = p.pollutant_code

select op.out_put_poll_id, op.out_put_id, op.pollutant_code, pc.pollutant_name_cn, pc.pollutant_name_en, pc.pollutant_unit_en, pc.pollutant_unit_cn, pc.unit_pf_cn, pc.unit_pf_en, op.pollutant_sort, op.is_zero_alarm, op.is_continuity_alarm, op.is_negative_alarm, op.monthly_limit_value, op.over_maxValue, op.over_minValue, op.create_time, op.update_time, op.mon_factor from t_ent_output_pollutant op left join t_bas_pollutant_code pc on pc.pollutant_code = op.pollutant_code where op.out_put_poll_id = #{outPutPollId}

select op.out_put_poll_id, op.out_put_id, op.pollutant_code, pc.pollutant_name_cn, pc.pollutant_name_en, pc.pollutant_unit_en, pc.pollutant_unit_cn, pc.unit_pf_cn, pc.unit_pf_en, op.pollutant_sort, op.is_zero_alarm, op.is_continuity_alarm, op.is_negative_alarm, op.monthly_limit_value, op.over_maxValue, op.over_minValue, op.create_time, op.update_time, op.mon_factor, op.rtd_unit, op.cou_unit, op.decimal_places from t_ent_output_pollutant op left join t_bas_pollutant_code pc on pc.pollutant_code = op.pollutant_code where op.out_put_id = #{outPutId} order by op.pollutant_sort desc

select g.pollutant_code as pollutantCode, g.is_zero_alarm as isZeroAlarm, g.is_continuity_alarm as isContinuityAlarm, g.is_negative_alarm as isNegativeAlarm, g.monthly_limit_value as monthlyLimitValue, g.over_maxValue as overMaxValue, g.over_minValue as overMinValue, g.rtd_unit as rtdUnit, g.cou_unit as couUnit, g.decimal_places as decimalPlaces, g.mon_factor as monFactor, p.pollutant_name_en as pollutantNameEn, p.pollutant_name_cn as pollutantNameCn, p.pollutant_unit_en as pollutantUnitEn, p.pollutant_unit_cn as pollutantUnitCn, p.unit_pf_cn as unitPfCn, p.unit_pf_en as unitPfEn from t_ent_output_pollutant g left join t_bas_pollutant_code p on p.pollutant_code = g.pollutant_code where g.out_put_id = #{outPutId} order by g.pollutant_sort desc

select g.pollutant_code as pollutantCode, g.over_maxValue as overMaxValue, g.rtd_unit as rtdUnit, g.decimal_places as decimalPlaces, g.mon_factor as monFactor, p.pollutant_name_cn as pollutantNameCn, p.pollutant_unit_en as pollutantUnitEn from t_ent_output_pollutant g left join t_bas_pollutant_code p on p.pollutant_code = g.pollutant_code where g.out_put_id = #{outPutId} order by g.pollutant_sort desc
mapper.insert: insert into t_ent_output_pollutant (out_put_poll_id, out_put_id, pollutant_code, pollutant_sort, is_zero_alarm, is_continuity_alarm, is_negative_alarm, monthly_limit_value, over_maxValue, over_minValue, rtd_unit, cou_unit, decimal_places, mon_factor, create_time) values (#{outPutPollId}, #{outPutId}, #{pollutantCode}, #{pollutantSort}, #{isZeroAlarm}, #{isContinuityAlarm}, #{isNegativeAlarm}, #{monthlyLimitValue}, #{overMaxvalue}, #{overMinvalue}, #{rtdUnit}, #{couUnit}, #{decimalPlaces}, #{monFactor}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select c.permit_count from t_ent_out_pollutant_permit_count c where c.pollutant_code = #{pollCode} and c.permit_year = #{year} and exists (select 1 from t_ent_out_put_info where out_put_id = #{outPutId} and ent_code = c.ent_code) order by c.poll_permit_count_id desc limit 1
